name: Candle Lamp Warmer Arched Gold and Black - Threshold™
description:
Set up your decor with a sophisticated piece using the Candle Lamp Warmer Arched Gold and Black from Threshold™. Designed to blend sleek style with cozy ambiance, this electric warmer gently heats jar candles using a halogen bulb rather than an open flame, releasing fragrance safely and evenly. Featuring a twist-lock bi-pin base (GU10) and an arched frame in a modern gold and black finish, it doubles as a stylish accent piece for any room. The glass lid complements the metal construction, creating a refined look that fits seamlessly into your decor while offering a flameless, fuss-free way to enjoy your favorite candles.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you™
